splash_desc: Accessibility Platform utilizing Computer Vision & Sign-to-Speech translation
register_desc: Create your vision-locked credentials using OTP validation. Fast, email-free authentication.
error_fill_fields: Please fill in both name and mobile fields.
error_invalid_otp: Invalid OTP code. Please enter '1919' for verification.
welcome_desc: Your device connection has been authenticated. You are ready to open the dashboard workspace.
hero_desc: SignBridge AI transforms American Sign Language (ASL) gestures into real-time speech and text using Computer Vision and deep neural network sequence pipelines. Built with accessibility-first principles to ensure natural connection for deaf, mute, and hearing-impaired communities.
manifesto_desc: Communication is a fundamental human right. Our platform is designed around strict WCAG guidelines. With high-contrast geometric themes, large and clear sans-serif typography, and keyboard navigation mechanisms, we guarantee accessibility for all users regardless of visual or motor capabilities.
roadmap_item1: Sign ➔ Voice: Seamless multi-accent speech outputs.
roadmap_item2: Voice ➔ Text: Integrated transcription engines (Whisper STT).
roadmap_item3: Text ➔ Sign: Synthetic 3D avators demonstrating signs in real-time.
roadmap_item4: AI Companion: Contextual translation suggestions and auto-complete filters.
cta_desc: Expand translation maps, record signs, or run live translation sessions to break down language barriers.
footer_copyright: SignBridge AI © 2026. Designed under the Bauhaus Aesthetic. Accessibility First.
challenge_desc: Over 70 million deaf individuals globally rely on sign language as their primary mode of communication. However, less than 1% of the hearing population understands sign language, creating absolute barriers in daily routines, workplaces, medical facilities, and emergency scenarios.
solution_desc: SignBridge AI bypasses traditional translators. By processing video feeds and predicting sign features in real time, it reconstructs conversational dialogue, offering instantaneous translation to hearing non-signers via text outputs and voice synthesis.
stage1_desc: The system reads frames from any camera (webcam, external source) using OpenCV, extracting raw visual information at 24+ frames per second.
stage2_desc: Features are processed using MediaPipe to generate x, y, and z skeletal coordinates for pose, fingers, hands, and facial indicators.
stage3_desc: Sequence models monitor joint coordinates over temporal sliding windows to identify gestures and decode them into coherent sentences.
stage4_desc: Decoded sentences are displayed visually and synthesized into synthetic audio formats, facilitating seamless accessibility.
feature_capture_desc: Webcam pipeline running MediaPipe tracking points with minimal lag.
feature_training_desc: Training console to record and export coordinate dataset collections.
feature_seq_desc: LSTM and Transformer architectures decoding sequences into fluent sentences.
feature_hub_desc: Chat transcripts database and accessibility text-to-speech tools.
feature_tts_desc: Coqui TTS engine generating natural voices across multiple languages.
feature_analytics_desc: Usage charts, daily timelines, and classification confidence indicators.
lt_subtitle: Real-time Sign Language to Text and Speech pipeline.
lt_camera_info: Click 'Start Camera' to launch webcam translation stream.
lt_camera_error: Failed to read camera frame. Check webcam connection.
ch_subtitle: Full conversation platform — dialogue management, emotion detection, voice synthesis, and history.
ch_signer_input_desc: In production, this receives output automatically from Layer 4. For testing, enter signs manually.
ch_thread_empty: Conversation thread is empty. Send a signer message to begin.
ch_thread_start_msg: Start a new session using the controls panel.
acc_subtitle: Universal access settings — themes, motion, keyboard navigation, and screen reader support.
acc_visual_desc: Select one or more themes. Multiple themes can be combined (e.g. Dark Mode + Reduced Motion).
acc_sample_card_desc: This card reflects your active theme settings.
acc_screen_reader_help: Adds ARIA live regions and additional screen reader hints.
acc_screen_reader_active: Screen reader mode active. Navigation landmarks enabled.
acc_keyboard_desc: SignBridge AI supports keyboard navigation for hands-free operation. All shortcuts use the ALT modifier key.
acc_sr_test_label: Type a message to test screen reader live region:
acc_footer_desc: SignBridge AI — Accessibility Engine (Layer 10) | WCAG 2.1 Compliant | Universal Design Principles
em_subtitle: Critical communication platform for life-threatening situations.
em_no_alerts: No emergency alerts sent in this session.
settings_subtitle: Fine-tune computer vision parameters, detection thresholds, and system preferences.
settings_save_success: Configuration settings updated successfully and pipeline reinitialized!
settings_info: Information: MediaPipe parameters determine the strictness of facial and hand bone skeleton estimation. If skeletons flicker, reduce the threshold levels.
admin_subtitle: System diagnostics, process configurations, and database administration tools.
admin_clear_success: Successfully cleared local offline translation log history!
admin_ping_success: MongoDB Atlas connection established and successfully pinged!
admin_ping_failure: Failed to connect to MongoDB. Check configuration URI and network access permissions.
ts_subtitle: Record custom gestures and compile landmark datasets for neural networks.
ts_before_recording: Before recording, make sure your webcam is clear and your hand is in view.
ts_capture_failed: Failed to capture frame during recording.
ts_no_datasets: No landmark datasets recorded yet. Start by capturing sign samples above.
db_subtitle: Advanced real-time human perception debugging, joint skeletal overlays, and telemetry analytics.
db_cam_error: Capture device initialization failed. Confirm webcam index is correct in settings.
db_activate_info: Activate the visual debug loop to view live joint tracking overlays.
an_subtitle: Real-time translation telemetry, gesture heatmaps, confidence tracking, and language distribution.
an_no_gesture_data: No gesture data yet. Start translating to generate analytics.
an_no_emotion_data: Emotion data will appear after translations are processed.
an_no_confidence_data: Confidence histogram data will appear after translations.
an_no_activity_data: Daily activity chart will appear after translation sessions are recorded.
lve_subtitle: SignBridge Real-time Ingestion & Feature Analytics Cockpit
lve_cam_error: Capture device initialization failed. Check settings.
lve_camera_info: Start camera ingestion loop to broadcast vision metrics.
lve_no_sessions: No recorded session folders present in data recordings directory.
lve_export_success: Dataset compiled and successfully exported to: {path}
lve_no_charts: Line charts will render dynamically once camera ingestion begins.
lgr_subtitle: SignBridge Real-time AI Classification & Sequence Decoding
lgr_camera_info: Start the AI Predictor camera loop to initiate real-time gesture classification.
lgr_no_gestures: No gestures registered in active buffer
lgr_before_recording: Before recording, make sure your body is in view. Pressing Start will start a 3-second countdown, then record 30 frames.
lgr_countdown_starting: Recording countdown starting in main camera feed...
lgr_train_info: Trigger training using PyTorch. If no recorded samples exist, the system will auto-generate synthetic sequence features.
lgr_train_success: Model successfully trained and saved! Version: {version}
lgr_rollback_success: Rollback successful! Active model set to {version}
lgr_no_previous_models: No previous model versions found in the registry catalog.
lgr_no_plots: Line plots will display dynamically once webcam prediction activates.
